evals.prompt: 帮我做一个项目管理的落地页（landing page），需要有英雄区、特性展示区、和底部CTA区域
evals.expected_output: 完整的React+TSX落地页，包含英雄区（5rem/900 gradient标题）、4列feature grid、glassmorphism风格卡片、mesh gradient+noise背景、Framer Motion入场动画
expectations: Uses #fdfbf7 as background color
Uses glass-bg rgba(255,255,255,0.7) for cards
Has backdrop-filter: blur on glass panels
Hero title uses gradient text with background-clip
Uses Inter font family
Uses Framer Motion for entrance animations
Includes mesh gradient background layer
Border radius values are in 12-32px range
Uses #38bdf8 as primary accent color

evals.prompt: 帮我做一个数据监控dashboard页面，左侧有侧边栏显示项目列表，中间是主工作区，右侧有统计面板
evals.expected_output: 三面板布局的dashboard页面，glass sidebar(320px)+flex center+glass stats panel(380px)，stat-item卡片，进度条动画，Framer Motion过渡效果
expectations: Has three-panel layout with glass sidebar and stats panel
Sidebar uses rgba(248,250,252,0.4) background with blur
Stats panel uses rgba(255,255,255,0.4) background with blur
Stat items show big numbers (1.5rem/900) with small labels (0.75rem uppercase)
Progress bar uses azure-to-deep gradient
Has Framer Motion animations on card entries
Uses premium-card pattern for content sections
Custom scrollbar styling present

evals.prompt: 帮我做一个代码审查报告的详情页面，需要有tab切换（概览和报告两个tab），底部显示finding列表，finding有不同的严重程度（critical/high/medium）
evals.expected_output: 带tab切换的详情页面，AnimatePresence过渡，finding列表带severity左条指示器，markdown渲染区，thinking-dot pulse动画
expectations: Has AnimatePresence tab transitions with enter/exit animations
Finding items have colored left-bar ::before pseudo-element
Critical findings use #ef4444 with glow shadow
High severity uses #f97316 orange
Medium severity uses #f59e0b amber
Markdown content has custom heading/body styling
Has thinking pulse animation or equivalent loading state
Uses label-xs uppercase style for section markers
